title: nepeta × tmolea
intro: Nepeta × faassenii, also known as Nepeta × tmolea, is a hybrid perennial plant in the mint family, derived from the cross of Nepeta faassenii and Nepeta govaniana. It is known for its ornamental value, with spikes of blue or purple flowers and heart-shaped leaves. Nepeta × tmolea has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and calm the nervous system, making it useful in treating conditions such as indigestion, anxiety, and insomnia. The herbal preparations of Nepeta × tmolea include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its health benefits and promote overall well-being.
